title: Tensura Soul Boost
description: A datapack that makes you learn faster after each Tensura Reincarnation Reset (ng+).
body:
Datapack for Tensura: Reincarnated

Learn faster after every reset!
Very light datapack that increase both your learning gain and mastery gain by the same amount of reset you did. Every change is logged in the chat, making it a breaze to understand how some skills affect you.

It functions using scoreboards, you can show player reset counter in tab by removing the # to uncomment in the file \data\soul_boost\function\load.mcfunction.
